name: Eggs Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the spinach according to package directions. Drain thoroughly and squeeze out as much moisture as possible.
2. Poach eggs.
3. Place a layer of spinach in the bottom of a buttered baking dish. Top with the poached eggs.
4. Pour Mornay sauce over all and sprinkle with cheese.
5. Broil for 5-10 minutes, or until the top is brown.
